checks.describe: the scheduler's Filter plugins name themselves in a FailedScheduling reason — a NodeAffinity mismatch reports 'node affinity/selector', proving the framework's Filter stage is live and readable (seeded and removed by the check)
checks.run:
kubectl --context kind-kubeadv-core create namespace m4-check3 --dry-run=client -o yaml | kubectl --context kind-kubeadv-core apply -f - >/dev/null; printf 'apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  name: filterprobe
spec:
  nodeSelector:
    disktype: nonexistent-ssd
  containers:
  - name: pause
    image: registry.k8s.io/pause:3.9
' | kubectl --context kind-kubeadv-core apply -n m4-check3 -f - >/dev/null; sleep 4; kubectl --context kind-kubeadv-core get events -n m4-check3 --field-selector involvedObject.name=filterprobe,reason=FailedScheduling -o jsonpath='{range .items[*]}{.message}{"
"}{end}' | tail -1; kubectl --context kind-kubeadv-core delete namespace m4-check3 --wait=false >/dev/null

checks.describe: a pod with a schedulingGate reports the SchedulingGated condition reason and is not bound to a node (seeded and removed by the check)
checks.run:
kubectl --context kind-kubeadv-core create namespace m4-check --dry-run=client -o yaml | kubectl --context kind-kubeadv-core apply -f - >/dev/null; printf 'apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  name: gatecheck
spec:
  schedulingGates:
  - name: m4-check/hold
  containers:
  - name: pause
    image: registry.k8s.io/pause:3.9
' | kubectl --context kind-kubeadv-core apply -n m4-check -f - >/dev/null; sleep 3; kubectl --context kind-kubeadv-core get pod gatecheck -n m4-check -o jsonpath='phase={.status.phase} reason={range .status.conditions[*]}{.reason}{end} node={.spec.nodeName}'; echo; kubectl --context kind-kubeadv-core delete namespace m4-check --wait=false >/dev/null

checks.describe: a high PriorityClass created for preemption carries its numeric value, the leverage preemption ranks pods by (seeded and removed by the check)
checks.run:
printf 'apiVersion: scheduling.k8s.io/v1
kind: PriorityClass
metadata:
  name: m4-check-high
value: 1000000
globalDefault: false
' | kubectl --context kind-kubeadv-core apply -f - >/dev/null; kubectl --context kind-kubeadv-core get priorityclass m4-check-high -o jsonpath='value={.value}'; echo; kubectl --context kind-kubeadv-core delete priorityclass m4-check-high >/dev/null

checks.describe: the DefaultTolerationSeconds admission plugin injects the not-ready/unreachable tolerations onto a plain pod (seeded and removed by the check)
checks.run:
kubectl --context kind-kubeadv-core create namespace m4-check2 --dry-run=client -o yaml | kubectl --context kind-kubeadv-core apply -f - >/dev/null; printf 'apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  name: tolcheck
spec:
  containers:
  - name: pause
    image: registry.k8s.io/pause:3.9
' | kubectl --context kind-kubeadv-core apply -n m4-check2 -f - >/dev/null; sleep 2; kubectl --context kind-kubeadv-core get pod tolcheck -n m4-check2 -o yaml | grep 'node.kubernetes.io'; kubectl --context kind-kubeadv-core delete namespace m4-check2 --wait=false >/dev/null
